Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}...And that's the summary of what happened on the night of the 7th.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}These Shadows seem to be quite a bit more formidable than the ordinary ones.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I see. So our enemies are growing stronger as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Well, it's not all bad news. In fact, I called today's meeting because—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Before we go on, I'd like to ask Kirijo-senpai something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I know I'm not the only one thinking this. So much has been happening lately...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I feel like I've just been getting dragged along without really understanding anything. But now, I want answers.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}So I'm gonna ask you straight out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}You've been hiding something from us, haven't you, Senpai?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}You're always acting like you don't know anything about the Dark Hour or Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}But they're connected to that {f 0 1 33}accident ten years ago{f 0 1 27}, aren't they?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}There was an explosion near our school, and a lot of people died.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}It must've been big news back then. You know about it, don't you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Luckily, no students were injured. But something is off here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}At the time of the incident, there were several unexplained absences.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Seems like more than just a coincidence to me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Well, I dug up some old school records, and found something interesting.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Those students weren't just absent. They all suddenly collapsed and had to be sent to the hospital![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Sounds familiar, doesn't it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Remember those girls who bullied Fuuka? They had to be hospitalized too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}What really happened on the day of that accident?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}The Kirijo Group built our school, so you have to know something![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}I wasn't trying to hide anything from you. It just never seemed relevant.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Shadows have many mysterious abilities.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}Some research indicates they can even affect time and space.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}We think of them as our enemies, but what if we could somehow use them to our advantage?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}They could be a source of unimaginable power, couldn't they?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}Fourteen years ago, one man pursued that very line of thinking.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}He was the former leader of the Kirijo Group, Kouetsu Kirijo.[n]{f 1 1}
